bunny_type.label: Bunny style
bunny_type.description: Choose how pixelated the bunny looks

auto_hop.label: Hop on its own
auto_hop.description: Let the bunny hop by itself every so often, even if you never click it

hop_min_seconds.label: Shortest time between hops (seconds)
hop_min_seconds.description: The bunny will wait at least this long before hopping again

hop_max_seconds.label: Longest time between hops (seconds)
hop_max_seconds.description: The bunny will wait at most this long before hopping again

click_to_pause.label: Click to pause/resume
click_to_pause.description: Left click pauses or wakes the bunny; when off, left click makes it hop instead

image_size.label: Bunny size
image_size.description: Height and width of the bunny sprite in the bar, in pixels

reactive_mode.label: React to typing
reactive_mode.description: Make the bunny hop along with your keystrokes instead of hopping on its own. Requires evtest and configuring input_devices below.

reactive_cooldown_ms.label: Reaction cooldown (ms)
reactive_cooldown_ms.description: Minimum time between typing-triggered hops, so fast typing doesn't spam the animation

input_devices.label: Input devices
input_devices.description: Keyboard device paths or globs to read with evtest, e.g. /dev/input/by-id/*-event-kbd. Required for typing reactivity.

executable_path.label: evtest path
executable_path.description: Path to the evtest executable used to read input devices
